name: rakuten-hunter
description: Rakuten deal hunter — scrape → score → content → local output (Telegram sink added later)
comment_dependencies: Phase 0 chỉ cần dotenv (pure JS) để npm install chạy nhanh, không build native. Các phase sau tự thêm: cheerio/playwright (Phase 1), @google/generative-ai (Phase 3, optional), canvas (Phase 3), node-cron + node-telegram-bot-api (Phase 5).
